custom_css: header .title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:0 1px 0 #d4af37,0 2px 0 #b8860b,0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5)!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:10px!important}header .title-3d::before{content:''!important;width:15px!important;height:15px!important;border:3px solid #0085c7!important;border-radius:50%!important;box-shadow:18px 0 0 -3px #000,36px 0 0 -3px #df0024!important;margin-right:45px!important}header button{background:#000!important;border:2px solid #d4af37!important;border-radius:8px!important;color:#d4af37!important}aside .btn-pulse,#main-fire-btn{background:linear-gradient(45deg,#d4af37,#f7ef8a,#d4af37)!important;color:#000!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:12px!important;text-shadow:0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.5)!important;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(212,175,55,0.4)!important;animation:brilho-ouro 3s infinite!important;background-size:200% 200%!important}#main-fire-btn:active,aside .btn-pulse:active{transform:scale(0.96)!important;filter:brightness(1.2)!important}@keyframes brilho-ouro{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}#streak-input{background:#111!important;border:1px solid #d4af37!important;color:#fff!important;border-radius:8px!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#d4af37!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background:#d4af37!important;height:3px!important}.item-card.selected-card{border-color:#d4af37!important;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(212,175,55,0.3)!important}
